closed_world.value: Mysterious large building where Amelia is captured and discovers she's a spy
closed_world.quote: she saw it, a mysterious, large building. She walked further, getting closer and closer to the building.

investigator.value: Amelia/Aaron Wilson, who discovers she is a spy and begins training undercover
investigator.quote: I'm Aaron Joyce Wilson. Now, take me to my training.

red_herring.value: Initial mysterious building encounter presented as dangerous intrigue, but reveals family legacy rather than crime
red_herring.quote: She walked further, getting closer and closer to the building. She heard voices around the corner

clue_fairness.value: Identity revelation through accessible files - reader sees same information as protagonist simultaneously
clue_fairness.quote: Her whole name was Aaron Joyce Wilson. She was experienced in self-defense and had her father's computer intelligence.

social_world.value: Secret agent hierarchy with undercover operations and institutional training structures
social_world.quote: She'll be undercover. Nobody has to know that she is an agent or have to leave.

reveal_mechanic.value: Physical files containing photographs and documented evidence of true identity and family history
reveal_mechanic.quote: There was a photo of Emily and Jason holding baby Aaron. Others included Aaron training, being like her parents.

media_and_audience.value: Aaron Wilson treated as famous missing person within agency circles
media_and_audience.quote: Aaron Wilson? The Aaron Wilson, the one that went missing? What am I? Famous?

investigator_wound.value: Identity crisis - protagonist must abandon known life/name while maintaining facade with loved ones
investigator_wound.quote: I'll have to leave my family won't I? So, let me get this straight. I will be undercover

_meta.title: ebook elle marie calhoun aaron wilson superspy extrodinare
